sections.paragraph:
comm. i.q. זֶה and זאֹת.

(1) demonstr. pron. Psa 12:8 Hab 1:11, זוּ כֹתֹו לֵאלֹהֹו “this his strength (is) for a god to him.” More frequently also-

(2) it is used as a relative, Exo 15:13 Psa 9:16 142:4 , and thus as a sign of relation, Isa 43:21 42:24 , זוּ חָטָאנוּ לֹו “against whom we have sinned.”

(In the Talmud זו not unfrequently is used for זה, and also in its compounded forms. The Tayitic Arabs are accustomed to use ذو for الذى; see Schult. ad Har. ii. p. 75.)
